---
title: Spatial Analysis Blocking Definitions
---

## Status

- Updated: March 5, 2026
- State: blocking
- Scope: required before scoring/proximity/export implementation proceeds beyond scaffolding

## Blocking Decisions: Market Metrics

| Metric | Canonical Formula | Time Window | Aggregation Grain | Null Handling | Owner | Due Date |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `market_size` | `SUM(commissioned_power_mw)` from canonical serving rows | `trailing_12_month` | `market` | `exclude` rows missing commissioned power | `data-platform` | `2026-03-31` |
| `absorption` | `AVG(absorption)` from approved market panel | `quarterly` | `market` | `exclude` rows missing absorption | `research-analytics` | `2026-03-31` |
| `vacancy` | `AVG(vacancy)` from approved market panel | `quarterly` | `market` | `exclude` rows missing vacancy | `research-analytics` | `2026-03-31` |

Required outcome:

- One authoritative formula per metric.
- One approved set of time windows (for example monthly, quarterly, trailing-12).
- One approved aggregation policy used by API, UI, and exports.

## Blocking Decisions: Pricing and Licensing

| Dataset | Sensitivity Tier | Allowed Query Granularity | Allowed Export Granularity | Minimum K-Anonymity | Cache TTL | Retention Days | Redistribution | Owner | Due Date |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `parcels` | `restricted` | `bbox`, `polygon`, `county`, `tileSet`, `parcel` | `none`, `parcel`, `county` | `5` | `900s` | `365` | `none` | `legal-compliance` | `2026-03-31` |
| `facilities` | `internal` | `bbox`, `polygon`, `county`, `facility`, `market` | `none`, `facility`, `county`, `market` | `null` | `300s` | `365` | `internal` | `product-geo` | `2026-03-31` |
| `power` | `internal` | `county`, `state`, `country`, `bbox` | `none`, `county`, `state`, `country` | `null` | `600s` | `365` | `internal` | `grid-intelligence` | `2026-03-31` |
| `fiber` | `restricted` | `bbox`, `polygon`, `county` | `none`, `county` | `10` | `300s` | `180` | `none` | `partner-operations` | `2026-03-31` |
| `market_metrics` | `internal` | `market`, `state`, `country` | `none`, `market`, `state`, `country` | `null` | `1800s` | `730` | `internal` | `research-analytics` | `2026-03-31` |

Required outcome:

- Dataset-level policy objects can be generated directly from this table.
- Export rules are explicit and enforceable in API without fallback behavior.

## Enforcement Targets

- `packages/contracts`: add strict schemas for metric definitions and data licensing policy payloads.
- `apps/api`: enforce entitlement and export policy checks at route boundaries.
- `apps/web`: show policy-based UX gating, but never rely on UI-only enforcement.

## Exit Criteria

1. No `UNDEFINED` or `UNASSIGNED` values remain.
2. Product, data, legal/compliance, and engineering owners sign off.
3. Contract tests and policy enforcement tests pass against finalized values.
